## 💡 Feature Summary

<!-- One-sentence summary of the feature. -->

## 🎯 Problem It Solves

<!-- What problem or pain point does this address? 
     "As a trader, I want to... so that I can..." -->

## 🔧 Proposed Solution

<!-- How would you like it to work? Be as specific as possible.
     - UI mockup or description
     - API endpoint if applicable
     - Integration with existing features -->

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed approach better? -->

## 📊 Impact

<!-- Who benefits from this? How often would it be used? -->

- [ ] This would benefit solo traders
- [ ] This would benefit developers building on top of Meme Terminal
- [ ] This addresses a feature other tools (GMGN, DEXScreener, etc.) have that we're missing

## 🏷️ Category

<!-- Check all that apply: -->

- [ ] Token Scanner
- [ ] Wallet Tracker
- [ ] Alert Engine
- [ ] AI Skills Layer
- [ ] New data source / chain support
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Developer experience
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## 📋 Additional Context
